title: We Craft Together
description: For Democ- I mean, Rock and- I mean, Diamonds!
body:
This modpack is to be installed upon joining to We Craft Together. It includes many vanilla-adjacent mods, world generation mods, optimization mods, and QOL mods.

I would also reccomend checking out [Vanilla Tweaks resource pack](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/). Due to its custom nature it would be impractical to include in the modpack, but it is a good fit nonetheless.
